headline: Biggest March Madness Upset Ever: Here's The Payout On A $100 Bet On Fairleigh Dickinson Over Purdue
summary: Since 1985, the NCAA Men’s Basketball National Tournament has featured a bracket of at least 64 teams seeded 1 through 16 in four different regions. For the second time ever, a 16 seed defeated a 1 seed, cementing its place in March Madness history.
